title: selaginella hollrungii
intro: Selaginella hollrungii is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly known as spikemoss or resurrection fern, due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Selaginella hollrungii are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
